Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
as described below.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.

We updated the âDual Acquiring PLUS/VISA CU ATMsâ description to include the PLUS Acquiring fee and to change the basis points associated with the International Acquirer Service fee. We also added the Visa Acquirer Data Processing fees for International ATM transactions.
We updated the âCirrus Networkâ description to correct the ATM Support fee for approved International Acquired Transactions. We also added the Mastercard Network Connectivity fee.
These are pass-through fees and are already in effect.
